programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Sporting CP in European competition, while the Gunners are the team the Portuguese side have faced most often in Europe without ever winning. Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: None of the seven meetings between Liverpool and Paris SG in all competitions have been drawn, with two of the Reds’ three wins coming at home. Paris SG won 1-0 at Anfield in the UEFA Champions League last 16 last season. The only sides to win consecutive away games against Liverpool in European competition are Barcelona and Atalanta, with neither of those doing so in back-to-back campaigns.

programme.title: Aston Villa - Bologna - QF2 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. Since beating West Brom 3-1 at the Hawthorns in March 1967, Bologna have lost their five away visits to England in all European competition. They’ve lost to Leeds, Fulham, Liverpool and Aston Villa twice.

programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Angers vs Havre AC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Angers have gone 10 consecutive Ligue 1 matches without scoring more than one goal against Le Havre, only managing to score more than once in the first of 11 meetings between the two sides in the division, on 1 October 1959. Angers have not lost any of their five home Ligue 1 matches against Le Havre, keeping three clean sheets in these encounters.

programme.title: Corinthians (BRA) vs Santa Fe (COL) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Lille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lille OSC have won just one of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against OGC Nice, a 2-1 victory at Pierre-Mauroy on 17 January 2025. Lille OSC currently have the best winning run and unbeaten run in Ligue 1. Lille OSC have even won their last two matches by more than two goals, a first since October 2020, but they have not done better since December 2009.

programme.title: Lorient vs Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Olympique de Marseille have beaten Lorient more than any other side in Ligue 1, boasting a 60% win rate against them, which is also more than any other team. programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.
